notableEvents.label: Jake Fraley GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Fraley grounds into a double play, pitcher Sean Burke to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Jake Fraley out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jonny DeLuca pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca homers (2) on a line drive to left center field. Jonathan Aranda scores. Yandy Díaz scores.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Vilade pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade pops out to first baseman Miguel Vargas.

notableEvents.label: Ben Williamson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ben Williamson flies out to center fielder Luisangel Acuña.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill singles on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson. Sam Antonacci to 3rd. Tanner Murray to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Ian Seymour. Sam Antonacci scores. Tanner Murray to 3rd. Derek Hill to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luisangel Acuña GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña grounds into a double play, shortstop Taylor Walls to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Ryan Vilade. Derek Hill scores. Reese McGuire out at 2nd. Luisangel Acuña out at 1st.
